heading: TAX BILLS
operative_text: Except as provided by Subsections (f), (i-1), and (k), the assessor for each taxing unit shall prepare and mail a tax bill to each person in whose name the property is listed on the tax roll and to the person's authorized agent. The assessor shall mail tax bills by October 1 or as soon thereafter as practicable.
_note: Statute contains duplicate subsections (d-2) and (d-3) enacted by both S.B. 4 (Ch. 338) and S.B. 23 (Ch. 340), 89th Leg., R.S., 2025, each contingent on a different constitutional amendment (S.J.R. 2 vs. S.J.R. 85) for school district residence homestead provisional tax bills for the 2025 tax year. Subsections (d-2)–(d-5) expire December 31, 2026.
